_comment: Canonical example of a fully valid SDOA v5.0 manifest with all fields populated.
_source: Synthesized from SDOA-Whitepaper-Technical.txt Section 4.5, Registry.service.ts, Registrar.service.js, Conductor.service.js
_id_note: Unique module identifier. Format: Name.type. No two modules may share an id.
_type_note: Module type. Valid: primitive | feature | adapter | service | workflow | repository | task | engine | utility | component | dashboard | validator
_runtime_note: Execution environment. Valid: Browser | NodeJS | Universal | Wasm | Python | Rust | C++ | COBOL | VB
_version_note: Semantic version string. Three-part format (major.minor.patch). Patch increments on every change (Gate 4).
_operationalRole_note: v5.0 field. Valid: registrar | captain | conductor | coach | probation-officer | assembly-line | triage | savant. Use 'savant' for domain-expert modules with no system governance role.
_requires_note: v4.0 name. Array of module IDs this module depends on. Registry validates all are registered before initAll().
_capabilities_note: v1.2 mandatory field. Array of capability strings this module provides.
_dependencies_note: v1.2 name for the same concept as 'requires'. Both may be present.
_dataFiles_note: v4.0 field. Paths to external .json files loaded at runtime. Must live with the consuming sovereign.
_lifecycle_note: v4.0 field. Backend modules: [init, run, dispose]. UI modules: [init, mount, update, unmount, destroy].

actions._actions_note: v4.0 field. The full action surface of this module.

multiply.description: Multiplies two matrices. Returns the product matrix.

registry:moduleRegistered.description: Triggers index rebuild when a new module joins the registry.

_backendDeps_note: v4.0 field. Adapter-only. Declares which backend actions this module needs. BackendConnector reads this to build routing table.

optimization._priority_note: v5.0 field. Valid: speed | safety | readability | memory-footprint
optimization._assertionSuite_note: v5.0 field. Path to test suite JSON for this module. Empty string if no suite yet.

docs.description: High-performance Rust execution unit for vectorized floating-point matrix transformations.
docs.author: ProtoAI Core Architecture Group

_last_modified_note: v1.2 mandatory field. ISO 8601 timestamp. Updated on every change (Gate 4 — Micro-Incrementation).
